allow: Bash(AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=local AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=local aws dynamodb scan --table-name turbotax-filings --endpoint-url http://localhost:8000 --region us-east-1 --filter-expression "formType = :ft" --expression-attribute-values '{":ft":{"S":"F1065"}}' --output json)

Bash(AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=local AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=local aws dynamodb update-item --table-name turbotax-filings --endpoint-url http://localhost:8000 --region us-east-1 --key '{"taxpayerId":{"S":"54042dbc-274b-4158-8910-06534ebf4a86"},"sk":{"S":"2025#F1040#FEDERAL"}}' --update-expression 'REMOVE aiPredictedDays, aiConfidence, aiModelVersion' --return-values ALL_NEW)
